name: Tofu Salad Crunch Pitas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hard tofu, pressed, and cut
1/2 cup Half moon slices of cucumber
1/3 cup Tofu or other eggless mayo
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir fry tofu cubes in vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet until golden and crispy, about 15 minutes. Sprinkle with salt.
2. Combine all ingredients except pita bread and lettuce. Cover and refrigerate for one hour to blend flavors.
3. Line pita pockets with leaf lettuce and fill with tofu salad.
